excerpt: In Pydantic V1, the alias property returns the field's name when no alias is set. In Pydantic V2, this behavior has changed to return None when no alias is set.
review_notes: Same public field lookup; reading alias for an unaliased model field returns the field name in V1 and null in V2.
reproduction_command: py310="$(uv python find 3.10)" && silent-drift-miner reproduce plan --candidate-id pydantic-field-alias-none --library pydantic --old-version 1.10.15 --new-version 2.7.4 --client-file cases/pydantic_field_alias_none/client.py --old-python-executable "$py310" --new-python-executable "$py310" --out data/reproductions/pydantic-field-alias-none/spec.json && silent-drift-miner reproduce run --spec data/reproductions/pydantic-field-alias-none/spec.json --out data/reproductions/pydantic-field-alias-none --install --venv-root .repro_venvs --build-timeout 300 --timeout 60
